mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_access_stats (full_short_url, date, pv, uv, uip, hour, weekday) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{pv}, #{uv}, #{uip}, #{hour}, #{weekday})
INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_locale_stats (full_short_url, date, cnt, province, city, adcode, country) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{cnt}, #{province}, #{city}, #{adcode}, #{country})
INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_os_stats (full_short_url, date, cnt, os) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{cnt}, #{os})
INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_browser_stats (full_short_url, date, cnt, browser) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{cnt}, #{browser})
INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_device_stats (full_short_url, date, cnt, device) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{cnt}, #{device})
INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_network_stats (full_short_url, date, cnt, network) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{cnt}, #{network})

INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_access_logs (full_short_url, user, ip, browser, os, network, device, locale) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{user}, #{ip}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{network}, #{device}, #{locale})
INSERT INTO shortlink_stats.link_stats_today (full_short_url, date, today_pv, today_uv, today_uip) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{todayPv}, #{todayUv}, #{todayUip})
mapper.select: SELECT formatDateTime(date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, SUM(pv) AS pv, SUM(uv) AS uv, SUM(uip) AS uip FROM shortlink_stats.link_access_stats WHERE full_short_url = #{fullShortUrl} AND shortlink_stats.link_access_stats.date >= toDate(#{startDate}) AND shortlink_stats.link_access_stats.date <= toDate(#{endDate}) GROUP BY shortlink_stats.link_access_stats.date ORDER BY shortlink_stats.link_access_stats.date
SELECT SUM(pv) AS pv, SUM(uv) AS uv, SUM(uip) AS uip FROM shortlink_stats.link_access_stats WHERE full_short_url = #{fullShortUrl} AND date >= toDate(#{startDate}) AND date <= toDate(#{endDate})

SELECT province, SUM(cnt) AS cnt FROM shortlink_stats.link_locale_stats WHERE full_short_url = #{fullShortUrl} AND date >= toDate(#{startDate}) AND date <= toDate(#{endDate}) GROUP BY province ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT user, ip, browser, os, network, device, locale, formatDateTime(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS createTime FROM shortlink_stats.link_access_logs WHERE full_short_url = #{fullShortUrl} AND toDate(create_time) >= toDate(#{startDate}) AND toDate(create_time) <= toDate(#{endDate}) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shortlink_stats.link_access_logs WHERE full_short_url = #{fullShortUrl} AND toDate(create_time) >= toDate(#{startDate}) AND toDate(create_time) <= toDate(#{endDate})
